turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi , natalie . how is natalie ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good . how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: it's good to see natalie .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good to see the doctor , too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor knows the doctor's nurse has already told natalie about dax . is it okay if the doctor tells dax a little bit about natalie ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: go for it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . so , natalie is a 39-year-old female , here today for a check-up for an abnormal lab . natalie has got a history of high blood pressure , diabetes , and acl repair . so , tell the doctor what's going on .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so , uh , natalie got some re- routine blood work done last week and , uh , the lab said that natalie's blood sugars were , were high , so that natalie should come in , um , and talk to the doctor and get some more work done and , and , uh , see why natalie's blood sugars are high .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . well , was natalie having any symptoms at all or just , the doctor had some blood work done routinely ? uh , any chest pain , shortness of breath ? any nausea , vomiting , or diarrhea ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , no symptoms . uh , so natalie was a little shocked when natalie's blood sugars came back high and , and elevated , so hopefully natalie and the doctor can figure out what's going on .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor and natalie have been , kind of , checking on the diabetes for a while and natalie has been on metformin . the doctor actually increased natalie's metformin dose last time-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yup .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so right now natalie is on 100 , 1,000 milligrams a day of metformin , correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: correct . yup .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . no , uh , no difficulty urinating or burning when natalie urinates at all ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nope .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . um , hey , dragon , show the doctor the hemoglobin a1c . so in reviewing natalie's hemoglobin a1c , that's the lab that the doctor checked after when the doctor saw before the doctor walked in . the hemoglobin a1c says 8.1 , which is elevated , so the doctor thinks the doctor needs to do a maybe a better job with adjusting natalie's medication . how is natalie doing with natalie's diet for natalie's diabetes ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: natalie's diet's been really great lately . natalie has been avoiding sugars , um , been really watching , uh , natalie's weight and power walking every day , so natalie was a little surprised when the , the blood work came back that natalie- natalie had , um , an elevated , uh , test .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and , uh , has natalie had any , uh , any other , is natalie checking natalie's blood sugars in the morning or natalie's fasting blood sugars ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , natalie is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . how is natalie doing with natalie's high blood pressure ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: natalie's high blood pressure's been good and stable . um , natalie has been stable on the medication , been taking the medication every day . um , and natalie has a b- a cuff at home to , to measure natalie's blood pressure herself and that , everything's been normal .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . and how's natalie's knee doing that's the other issue the doctor and natalie have been , kind of , following ? did natalie have some surgery done for natalie's knee ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . about five years ago , natalie had , um , an acl repair on natalie's right knee and everything's been going well so far . natalie has n't had any , uh , issues with mobility . um , natalie's right knee has been great .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and natalie is pretty physically active and doing exercises ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . natalie has been power walking about , at least 30 minutes every day .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . great . well , let's review , uh , some of natalie's vital signs . hey , dragon , show the doctor the vitals . all right . blood pressure looks good right now . natalie's oxygen level's great . uh , natalie's temperature's good . so the doctor knows natalie checked in with the review of systems with the doctor's assistant before coming in . uh , is anything else bothering natalie today except for the abnormal blood work ? no chest pain ? no shortness of breath ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , nothing like that ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no headaches ? no belly pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good . great . well , let the doctor examine natalie , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright . the doctor is just gon na listen to natalie's heart here . no belly pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nope .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so on exam , uh , natalie's hent or natalie's neck exam is fine . natalie's , uh , natalie's eyes look fine . natalie's lungs are clear . the doctor does hear a systolic ejection murmur , about three over six . natalie's belly's nice and soft . no swelling in natalie's legs or extremities right now . so let's talk about some of the issues today . all right . for the first issue , for the diabetes , since natalie's hemoglobin a1c is is elevated , uh , and natalie is already on 1,000 milligrams of metformin , the doctor thinks the doctor should add , uh , jardiance , uh , 10 milligrams a day . uh , so jardiance is a new medication . the doctor will start jardiance . the doctor does want natalie to , uh follow natalie's diet pretty , uh , aggressively . the doctor wan na see if the doctor can get natalie's hemoglobin a1c down the next time . the doctor is also gon na add some labs today to see what the labs show , to see a lipid panel and some other blood work . hey , dragon , order a cbc , cmp , and a lipid panel . and the doctor will go ahead and prescribe the jardiance , 10 milligrams a day . hey , dragon , prescribe , uh , order jardiance , 10 milligrams a day . all right . for the high blood pressure , the doctor thinks natalie is doing great . natalie is on lisinopril for high blood pressure , so the doctor thinks the doctor should continue lisinopril . uh , the doctor will re-check natalie's blood pressure again next time and natalie is monitoring natalie's blood pressure at home , correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , natalie is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , great . and for the knee , the doctor thinks natalie is doing great with the knee . the doctor knows , continue with natalie's physical exercise , with natalie's physical therapy , uh , uh , with natalie's normal exercise regimen . uh , if natalie has any issues with the knee , certainly give the doctor a call .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . does natalie have any other questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , that's it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . hey , dragon , finalize the note .
